---

## Retail Demo Validation Report

### Validation Harness

| # | Check | Result | Details |
|---|-------|--------|---------|
| 1 | **Row count comparison** | **PASS** | Bronze: 100,000 / Silver: 100,000 / Gold: 11,693 -- Bronze-to-Silver is 1:1; Gold aggregates to 11,693 daily revenue rows (expected fan-in) |
| 2 | **Uniqueness (silver order_id)** | **PASS** | 0 duplicate order_ids -- ROW_NUMBER-before-MERGE pattern is working |
| 3 | **Negative total_amount** | **PASS** | 0 violations |
| 4 | **Negative unit_price** | **PASS** | 0 violations |

### Proof Points

| # | Check | Result | Details |
|---|-------|--------|---------|
| 5 | **CHECK constraint enforcement** | **PASS** | Insert of `total_amount = -100.00` was **rejected** with `DELTA_VIOLATE_CONSTRAINT_WITH_VALUES` on constraint `chk_silver_amount` |
| 6 | **Pruning proof (Liquid Clustering)** | **PASS** | EXPLAIN shows `DictionaryFilters: [(event_date >= 2026-02-20), (customer_id = C000123)]` -- Photon is applying dictionary-based file pruning on both clustering columns. Query is **fully supported by Photon**. |
| 7 | **Time travel / audit trail** | **PASS** | 7 versions (0-6) recorded: CREATE TABLE -> ADD CONSTRAINT (chk_silver_amount) -> ADD CONSTRAINT (chk_silver_status) -> CLUSTER BY (customer_id, event_date) -> MERGE (100k rows inserted) -> OPTIMIZE (liquid clustering) -> OPTIMIZE (compaction: 4 files -> 1 file, 2.15MB -> 2.10MB) |

### Summary: 7/7 PASS

The `retail_demo` pipeline is healthy. Data flows 100k rows bronze-to-silver with no duplicates or constraint violations. Gold correctly aggregates to ~11.7k daily revenue rows. CHECK constraints actively reject bad data, Liquid Clustering enables file pruning, and Delta history provides full audit lineage.</result>
